title: pelargonium × erectum
intro: Pelargonium × erectum, also known as the Stiff Leaved Geranium or the Zonal Geranium, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, characterized by its stiff, upright leaves and vibrant flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and sore throats, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × erectum include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for a range of herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
